controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Provide cross-project or cross-workspace inventory, governance and operating oversight.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Unity Catalog governs assets; Unity AI Gateway governs AI traffic and service behaviour.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Microsoft Foundry Control Plane manages agents, models and tools across projects with compliance, cost and security views.
awsSagemakerAi: SageMaker Model Dashboard, Model Registry, Assets and DataZone provide ML governance; not one single GenAI fleet control plane.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock governance is assembled from IAM, Guardrails, evaluations, CloudTrail, CloudWatch and related AWS governance services.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Agent Platform provides centralized build, scale, govern and optimize experiences; Gemini Enterprise app provides organization-level agent visibility.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Cloud Asset Inventory, IAM, Security Command Center, Cloud Audit Logs, Dataplex Universal Catalog.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Databricks and Google separate asset governance from traffic/runtime governance; Microsoft is moving toward one fleet control plane.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Discover agents, models, tools, prompts and governed AI resources.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Catalog Explorer; Unity Catalog securables including models, model services, MCP services, functions and connections.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Foundry Control Plane Assets pane for agents, models and tools across projects.
awsSagemakerAi: Model Registry, Model Dashboard, SageMaker Assets and Studio.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock resources inventory through console/APIs, AWS Config patterns and tagging.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Agent Registry catalogs agents, tools and MCP servers; model registry remains part of Agent Platform.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Cloud Asset Inventory and Dataplex Universal Catalog.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Inventory coverage differs: some products catalog models, while others catalog the full agent/tool estate.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Control project boundaries, connected resources, ownership and administrators.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Account, metastore, catalog, schema and workspace bindings.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Foundry Admin pane, projects, hubs/connected resources, Azure RBAC and subscription hierarchy.
awsSagemakerAi: SageMaker domains, spaces, user profiles, IAM and AWS Organizations.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock projects are governed through AWS accounts, IAM, tags, VPC and surrounding AWS controls.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Projects, folders, organizations, Agent Platform administration and Gemini Enterprise Admin.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Resource Manager, Organization Policy Service and IAM.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Cloud hierarchy remains the ultimate governance boundary even when the AI platform has its own project concept.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Grant least-privilege access to AI assets and operations.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Unity Catalog privileges, ownership, privilege inheritance and workspace bindings.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Azure RBAC, Microsoft Entra ID and Foundry project roles.
awsSagemakerAi: IAM policies and SageMaker Role Manager persona-based roles.
amazonBedrock: IAM permissions for models, agents, knowledge bases, prompts and guardrails.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Cloud IAM roles and Agent Identity.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: IAM Conditions, Access Context Manager and service accounts.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Use workload/agent identity separately from human identity.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Apply policies based on tags, classifications, users or contextual attributes.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Unity Catalog ABAC grant policies, row filters and column masks.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Azure ABAC conditions, Azure Policy, Purview classifications and Entra Conditional Access patterns.
awsSagemakerAi: IAM tags and conditions, Lake Formation LF-Tags and resource policies.
amazonBedrock: IAM conditions and resource tags; Bedrock does not provide a separate universal ABAC layer.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: IAM Conditions, metadata labels and governance policies.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: IAM Conditions, tags and VPC Service Controls.
importantDistinctionCaveat: ABAC maturity varies by object type; verify support for agents, models, tools and data separately.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Give agents their own identity or allow controlled delegation on behalf of a user.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Databricks unified authentication and user passthrough patterns; agent access is bounded by Unity Catalog privileges.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Microsoft Entra agent identity and Foundry Agent Service managed identity patterns.
awsSagemakerAi: IAM roles for agents and workloads; service roles for SageMaker and Bedrock.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock Agents service roles and action-group permissions.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Agent Identity can authenticate to tools, cloud resources, endpoints and other agents, as itself or on behalf of a user.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Workload Identity Federation, IAM service accounts and IAP.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Agent identity is an AI-specific control and should be documented independently from the model endpoint identity.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Register, version, approve and promote models through lifecycle stages.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: MLflow Model Registry in Unity Catalog with versions, parameters, metrics, lineage and deployment jobs.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Azure Machine Learning model registry and Foundry Models catalog/deployments.
awsSagemakerAi: SageMaker Model Registry with versions, metadata and approval status.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock manages provider/customized models, but SageMaker Model Registry is the stronger traditional model-lifecycle registry.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Agent Platform Model Registry; model support and lifecycle are now within Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Artifact Registry and ML Metadata for supporting artifacts.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Do not confuse a foundation-model catalog with an internal model registry.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Discover first-party and partner foundation models.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Databricks-hosted foundation models and external model providers exposed through model services.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Foundry Models catalog including Microsoft, OpenAI and partner models.
awsSagemakerAi: SageMaker JumpStart model hub.
amazonBedrock: Amazon Bedrock model catalog.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Agent Platform Models with Google and partner models; platform documentation states access to more than 200 models.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Model Garden / Agent Platform Models.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Catalog breadth is not the same as governance depth or regional availability.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Store, version and reuse prompts with traceable changes.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: MLflow 3 logged models/traces and prompt/version tracking patterns.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Foundry prompt flow and prompt assets; tracing and evaluation can link prompt changes to outcomes.
awsSagemakerAi: SageMaker/MLflow experiment artifacts; no single SageMaker-native prompt registry equivalent.
amazonBedrock: Amazon Bedrock Prompt Management.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Agent Platform Prompt Management and Prompt Optimization.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Cloud Source Repositories alternatives, Artifact Registry and Git-based controls.
importantDistinctionCaveat: A production prompt should be treated as a governed artifact with owner, version, evaluation and rollback.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Register and govern tools, functions and external connections used by agents.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Unity Catalog functions, MCP Services and connections are securable objects.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Foundry Agent Service tools, connected resources and Control Plane tool inventory.
awsSagemakerAi: SageMaker functions are typically implemented through Lambda, APIs and feature/data services.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock Agent action groups, Lambda functions, APIs and knowledge bases.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Skill Registry, Agent Registry, MCP servers and tools.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: API Gateway, Cloud Run, Integration Connectors and Service Directory.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Tool governance requires both catalog permissions and runtime policy enforcement.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Register, authorize and filter MCP servers and tools.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Unity Catalog MCP Services with privileges, tool filtering and service policies.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Foundry supports MCP-connected agents and agent/tool governance through Control Plane and Entra.
awsSagemakerAi: MCP endpoints can be hosted in AWS services and governed with IAM/API controls.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock Agents and AgentCore can integrate tools; MCP governance is composed with IAM and gateway controls.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Agent Registry, Agent Gateway and remote MCP server support.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: IAM, IAP, Cloud Run, API Gateway and VPC controls.
importantDistinctionCaveat: MCP support is evolving quickly; verify preview/GA status before production approval.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Govern tables, files, features, models and AI assets from a common metadata layer.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Unity Catalog is the unified governance layer for data and AI.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Microsoft Purview for enterprise data governance; Foundry Control Plane for AI fleet governance.
awsSagemakerAi: Amazon DataZone, Glue Data Catalog, Lake Formation and SageMaker Assets.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock Knowledge Bases connect governed data sources but are not a full enterprise data catalog.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Dataplex Universal Catalog plus Agent Registry and Model Registry.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Dataplex Universal Catalog, Cloud Asset Inventory and BigQuery metadata.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Microsoft and Google commonly use separate data-governance and AI-governance products; Databricks emphasizes one catalog.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Trace source data, transformations, features, training runs, models and downstream consumers.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Unity Catalog captures data and model lineage; MLflow links runs, metrics and registered models.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Microsoft Purview lineage, Azure ML lineage/MLflow and Foundry traces.
awsSagemakerAi: SageMaker ML Lineage Tracking, Model Dashboard, DataZone and Glue lineage patterns.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock traces agents/flows, but end-to-end training lineage typically comes from SageMaker and data services.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: ML Metadata, Agent Platform Pipelines, Model Registry and Dataplex lineage.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Dataplex lineage and Cloud Logging.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Agent runtime traces are not a replacement for data/model provenance.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Measure whether training, grounding and operational data meet defined quality rules.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Lakehouse Monitoring, expectations/data-quality features and Unity Catalog metadata.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Microsoft Purview Data Quality, Fabric/Databricks quality controls and Azure ML data validation.
awsSagemakerAi: AWS Glue Data Quality, SageMaker Data Wrangler and Model Monitor baselines.
amazonBedrock: Knowledge Base evaluation measures retrieval/generation outcomes but not enterprise data quality.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Dataplex/Knowledge Catalog data quality and Agent Platform evaluation.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: BigQuery, Dataplex Universal Catalog and Dataform tests.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Data quality, retrieval quality and model quality must be separate control families.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Route, secure and observe model, agent and tool traffic centrally.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Unity AI Gateway routes model and MCP requests and applies limits, budgets and service policies.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Foundry AI gateway plus Control Plane governance across models and agents.
awsSagemakerAi: AWS API Gateway, Bedrock AgentCore Gateway and IAM/WAF patterns.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock endpoints, inference profiles and AgentCore can form the runtime control plane.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Agent Gateway secures and governs ingress, egress and agent-to-agent/tool interactions.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Apigee, API Gateway, IAP, Model Armor and Cloud Armor.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Unity AI Gateway is Beta; Google Agent Gateway is newer and includes preview capabilities; check production status.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Route requests across model backends for quality, availability or cost.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Unity AI Gateway traffic splitting and fallbacks across model backends.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Foundry model deployments, gateway policies and application-level routing.
awsSagemakerAi: SageMaker inference components and multi-model endpoints; application routing patterns.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock intelligent prompt routing and cross-region inference profiles.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Agent Gateway/routing patterns and model endpoints; application-level routing remains important.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Global load balancing, service extensions and application routing.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Routing can change model behaviour; evaluate and document fallback quality before enabling.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Prevent abuse and protect shared capacity.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Unity AI Gateway rate limits on model and MCP services.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Foundry Control Plane quota and token-based rate limits.
awsSagemakerAi: Service Quotas, SageMaker endpoint limits and API Gateway throttling.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock quotas, service tiers and application-level throttling.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Agent Gateway, IAM governance and Cloud Quotas.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Cloud Quotas and API Gateway quotas.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Separate provider quota, organizational budget and per-user/application rate limits.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Set spend thresholds, hard caps and cost attribution.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Unity AI Gateway budgets, per-user thresholds, hard caps, usage/system tables and tags.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Foundry cost and token views, Azure budgets and Cost Management.
awsSagemakerAi: AWS Budgets, Cost Explorer, SageMaker cost allocation tags and Compute Optimizer.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock usage metrics, cost allocation tags, inference profiles and budgets.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Agent Platform cost/usage management, budgets and billing export.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Cloud Billing, BigQuery billing export and FinOps hub.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Token cost alone is incomplete; include retrieval, vector DB, tools, compute, observability and data transfer.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Capture prompts, outputs, status, latency and traces for audit or debugging.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Unity AI Gateway inference tables and Unity Catalog Delta tables; system.ai_gateway.usage.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Application Insights, Azure Monitor and Foundry tracing/evaluation logs.
awsSagemakerAi: CloudWatch Logs, SageMaker data capture and CloudTrail.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock invocation logging to CloudWatch Logs/S3 and agent/flow traces.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Request-response logging to BigQuery when enabled; Agent Observability and Cloud Logging.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Cloud Logging, BigQuery and Cloud Trace.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Logging can create privacy and retention risk; redact and define sampling/retention deliberately.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Control persistence of prompts, responses, sessions, traces and caches.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Retention is configured through Unity Catalog tables, system tables and workspace/account data policies.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Azure Monitor retention, storage retention, Foundry project configuration and privacy controls.
awsSagemakerAi: CloudWatch/S3 retention, SageMaker data capture policies and lifecycle rules.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock service-specific retention plus optional invocation logging under customer control.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Zero-data-retention guidance covers request-response logging, session resumption and other model features.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Cloud Logging retention, BigQuery TTL, Cloud Storage lifecycle and DLP.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Zero-retention requirements must be verified feature by feature, not assumed from the platform brand.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Detect and block harmful, unsafe or policy-violating content.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Unity AI Gateway service policies and Databricks AI guardrail patterns.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Azure AI Content Safety, Foundry guardrail policies and content filters.
awsSagemakerAi: SageMaker processing/evaluation patterns and partner tools.
amazonBedrock: Amazon Bedrock Guardrails content filters.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Model Armor and platform safety settings.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Model Armor and Sensitive Data Protection.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Safety policies should be tested against the actual domain and languages.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Detect adversarial instructions and indirect prompt attacks.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Unity AI Gateway service policies, tool filtering and custom policy functions.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Prompt Shields, Foundry evaluations, red teaming and Control Plane risk monitoring.
awsSagemakerAi: SageMaker/third-party detectors, WAF/API controls and application-level defenses.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock Guardrails prompt attack filters and contextual grounding checks.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Model Armor, semantic governance policies and Agent Gateway.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Security Command Center AI Protection and Model Armor.
importantDistinctionCaveat: No control is perfect; combine input controls, least privilege, output validation and monitoring.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Prevent leakage of personal, confidential or regulated data.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Unity Catalog classifications, row/column controls, service policies and logged-table governance.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Microsoft Purview, Azure AI Content Safety, Defender and DLP integrations.
awsSagemakerAi: Amazon Macie, Lake Formation, Glue classifiers and SageMaker data controls.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock Guardrails sensitive information filters.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Model Armor and Sensitive Data Protection.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Sensitive Data Protection, VPC Service Controls and Cloud DLP controls.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Apply controls to input, retrieval results, tool outputs, model outputs and logs.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Allow, deny or require approval based on intent, identity and requested action.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Unity AI Gateway service policies can govern request/response content and MCP tool use.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Foundry guardrail policies, agent/tool inventory, Entra permissions and approval workflow patterns.
awsSagemakerAi: IAM authorization, Verified Permissions, API Gateway and Step Functions approvals.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock Agents action groups, confirmation settings and IAM permissions.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Semantic Governance Policy and Agent Gateway apply policies to tool calls and skills.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: IAM, IAP, Workflows and Policy Intelligence.
importantDistinctionCaveat: This is the central control for autonomous agents; model safety filters alone are insufficient.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Require human confirmation for high-impact actions or uncertain outputs.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Service policy approval patterns and application workflows.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Agent workflows, Logic Apps/Power Automate and human-in-the-loop application design.
awsSagemakerAi: A2I, Step Functions, Amazon Connect and approval workflows.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock Agents user confirmation/action controls and external approval workflows.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Application workflows, Agent Gateway policies and human review patterns.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Workflows, AppSheet/Google Workspace approval patterns.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Human oversight must be linked to clear thresholds, authority and evidence capture.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Measure quality, relevance, safety and task performance before release.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: MLflow 3 evaluation with built-in/custom scorers and human feedback.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Foundry Evaluations and Azure AI Evaluation SDK.
awsSagemakerAi: SageMaker Clarify, Processing Jobs, Experiments and custom evaluation pipelines.
amazonBedrock: Amazon Bedrock Evaluations.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Agent Platform Model Evaluation and Gen AI evals.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: BigQuery, Cloud Run and custom evaluation pipelines.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Evaluation datasets must reflect actual users, languages, edge cases and failure costs.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Measure retrieval quality, groundedness, relevance and answer correctness.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: MLflow 3 GenAI evaluation and trace-based scorers.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Foundry RAG evaluators such as groundedness and relevance.
awsSagemakerAi: SageMaker/MLflow and custom retrieval evaluation.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock model and Knowledge Base evaluations.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: RAG Engine evaluation patterns and Gen AI evaluation services.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: BigQuery evaluation datasets and Agent Platform evals.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Separate retrieval metrics from generation metrics to diagnose failures correctly.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Measure task completion, tool-call accuracy, path quality and policy adherence.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: MLflow 3 traces, agent scorers and human feedback.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Foundry agent evaluators for task adherence, intent resolution, tool-call success and related metrics.
awsSagemakerAi: Custom SageMaker/CloudWatch evaluation pipelines.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock agent traces and evaluation patterns; broader agent evaluation may require custom tooling.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Agent evaluation, offline evaluations and simulated evaluation.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Cloud Trace, Cloud Monitoring and custom test harnesses.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Agent evaluation must test state, memory, tool permissions, loops, failure recovery and side effects.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Evaluate production traffic and alert when quality or risk thresholds fail.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: MLflow 3 production monitoring and inference tables.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Foundry continuous evaluation integrated with Application Insights.
awsSagemakerAi: SageMaker Model Monitor, CloudWatch and scheduled evaluation jobs.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock invocation logs, CloudWatch and scheduled/custom evaluations.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Online monitoring and agent observability.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Cloud Monitoring, Cloud Logging and custom online evaluators.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Online evaluators can add cost and latency; use sampling and severity-based escalation.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Probe the system for safety, security and misuse vulnerabilities.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Custom MLflow evaluation suites and external red-team tools.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: AI Red Teaming Agent and scheduled scans in Foundry Control Plane.
awsSagemakerAi: AWS security testing tools, Bedrock Guardrails testing and custom red-team pipelines.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock evaluations/Guardrails plus external adversarial testing.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Model Armor, Security Command Center AI Protection and custom adversarial evaluation.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Security Command Center and Model Armor.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Automated red teaming supplements—not replaces—expert threat modelling and manual testing.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Assess disparate impact and explain model predictions.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: MLflow metrics/custom analysis; Unity Catalog documents and governs resulting artifacts.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Azure ML Responsible AI dashboard and explainability/fairness tooling.
awsSagemakerAi: SageMaker Clarify.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock is focused on foundation-model applications; traditional bias/explainability is stronger in SageMaker.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Agent Platform Explainable AI and custom fairness evaluation.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Explainable AI and BigQuery/Vertex analysis.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Generative-AI fairness often needs scenario and outcome analysis beyond feature attribution.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Record intended use, limitations, owners, risk rating and evaluation evidence.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Unity Catalog model metadata, MLflow model information, tags and documentation.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Azure ML model metadata, Responsible AI artifacts, Purview and Foundry asset metadata.
awsSagemakerAi: SageMaker Model Cards with intended uses, risk ratings, training and evaluation details.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock model cards come from providers; application/system cards should be maintained separately.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Model Registry metadata, model documentation and governance labels.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Dataplex/Artifact metadata and organization documentation.
importantDistinctionCaveat: The AI system card should include data, prompt, RAG, agent, tool and human-control details—not only the base model.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Version policies, track where they are applied and preserve auditability.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Unity Catalog privileges/policies, tags and service-policy attachments.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Foundry Compliance pane supports versioned policies and assignment tracking.
awsSagemakerAi: AWS Config, Organizations policies, IAM versions, Audit Manager and infrastructure as code.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock Guardrails versions and aliases plus AWS governance tooling.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Organization policies, IAM governance policies and Agent Gateway configuration.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Organization Policy Service and Terraform/IaC.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Treat policy changes as controlled releases with testing and rollback.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Record administrative, access, model, agent, tool and data events.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Unity Catalog audit logs, system tables, lineage and inference tables.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Azure Activity Log, Entra audit logs, Foundry telemetry, Purview and Defender alerts.
awsSagemakerAi: CloudTrail, SageMaker lineage, CloudWatch and Audit Manager.
amazonBedrock: CloudTrail, Bedrock invocation logs and CloudWatch.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Cloud Audit Logs, Agent Registry/Gateway logs and request-response logs.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Cloud Audit Logs, Security Command Center and BigQuery.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Audit evidence must be immutable enough for the relevant regulatory and investigative needs.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Trace model calls, tool calls, retrieval and agent execution paths.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: MLflow Tracing and inference tables.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Foundry tracing using OpenTelemetry and Application Insights.
awsSagemakerAi: SageMaker Debugger/Experiments and application tracing with X-Ray/OpenTelemetry.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock agent and flow traces plus X-Ray/application tracing.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Agent Observability traces and topology.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Cloud Trace and OpenTelemetry.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Use trace correlation IDs across API, retrieval, model, tool and downstream systems.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Monitor latency, failures, throughput, quality and resource health.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: System tables, inference tables, Lakehouse Monitoring and MLflow monitoring.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Foundry dashboards, Azure Monitor and Application Insights.
awsSagemakerAi: SageMaker Model Dashboard, Model Monitor and CloudWatch.
amazonBedrock: CloudWatch metrics/logs and Bedrock application monitoring.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Agent Observability, online monitoring and Cloud Monitoring.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Cloud Monitoring, Logging and Error Reporting.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Operational health and AI quality are different signals and should have separate SLOs.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Detect production input or prediction changes.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Lakehouse Monitoring, MLflow metrics and custom drift jobs.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Azure ML model monitoring and data drift capabilities.
awsSagemakerAi: SageMaker Model Monitor.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock application drift needs outcome/evaluation monitoring rather than traditional feature drift.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Model Monitoring on Agent Platform.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: BigQuery/Cloud Monitoring and Model Monitoring.
importantDistinctionCaveat: For LLM systems, monitor prompt, retrieval, tool, policy and user-distribution drift.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Attribute model usage and cost to teams, applications and users.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Unity AI Gateway system tables, usage tracking, principals, tags and budgets.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Foundry token/cost views and Azure Cost Management.
awsSagemakerAi: SageMaker metrics, Cost Explorer and cost allocation tags.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock model invocation metrics, cost tags and CloudWatch.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Agent Platform utilization, cost management and billing export.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Cloud Billing and BigQuery billing export.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Include failed retries, agent loops, context growth, embeddings, vector queries and tool costs.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Track runs, parameters, metrics, artifacts and comparisons.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: MLflow 3 Tracking.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Azure ML MLflow tracking and Foundry evaluation runs.
awsSagemakerAi: SageMaker Experiments.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock evaluations and prompt/model experiments are more application-focused.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Experiments on Agent Platform.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: TensorBoard, BigQuery and ML Metadata.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Use the same identifiers across experiment, dataset, model and deployment records.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Train traditional models and adapt foundation models.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Databricks ML runtimes, distributed training and foundation-model fine-tuning.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Azure Machine Learning training and Foundry model fine-tuning.
awsSagemakerAi: SageMaker Training, HyperPod, distributed training and JumpStart.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock Model Customization.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Agent Platform Managed Training, Serverless Training, tuning and reinforcement learning.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Cloud GPUs/TPUs and AI Hypercomputer.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Traditional training platform choice and managed foundation-model customization are separate decisions.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Automate feature/algorithm/model selection for supported ML tasks.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Databricks AutoML.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Azure Automated ML.
awsSagemakerAi: SageMaker Autopilot.
amazonBedrock: No direct Bedrock equivalent for traditional AutoML.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Agent Platform AutoML.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: BigQuery ML AutoML capabilities.
importantDistinctionCaveat: AutoML does not remove the need for validation, governance and monitoring.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Create and serve governed reusable ML features.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Databricks Feature Engineering integrated with Unity Catalog.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Azure ML managed feature store.
awsSagemakerAi: SageMaker Feature Store.
amazonBedrock: Not a Bedrock capability.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Agent Platform Feature Store.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: BigQuery, Spanner and Feast patterns.
importantDistinctionCaveat: A feature store is useful only when reuse, online/offline consistency and ownership justify it.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Orchestrate repeatable training, validation and deployment workflows.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Databricks Workflows/Lakeflow and MLflow deployment jobs.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Azure ML pipelines and Foundry workflows.
awsSagemakerAi: SageMaker Pipelines.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock Flows orchestrates GenAI application steps, not traditional ML pipelines.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Agent Platform Pipelines.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Cloud Composer, Workflows and Dataflow.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Distinguish data pipelines, ML pipelines and agent/application workflows.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Serve models through managed scalable endpoints.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Databricks Model Serving/model services.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Foundry model deployments and Azure ML managed online endpoints.
awsSagemakerAi: SageMaker real-time/serverless inference.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock managed model invocation endpoints.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Agent Platform Online Inference and Endpoints.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Cloud Run/GKE for custom serving.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Evaluate concurrency, cold start, model size, accelerator, residency and scaling controls.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Run predictions over large datasets asynchronously.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Databricks batch inference with Spark/SQL/MLflow.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Azure ML batch endpoints.
awsSagemakerAi: SageMaker Batch Transform and asynchronous inference.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock batch inference for supported models.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Agent Platform Batch Inference.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: BigQuery ML and Dataflow.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Batch is often cheaper and easier to govern when real-time response is unnecessary.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Host, scale and operate agents.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Databricks Apps/agent framework with MLflow tracing and Unity Catalog governance.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Foundry Agent Service for prompt and hosted code agents.
awsSagemakerAi: SageMaker can host agent applications, but Bedrock/AgentCore is the closer managed agent platform.
amazonBedrock: Agents for Amazon Bedrock and Amazon Bedrock AgentCore.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Agent Runtime (renamed from Agent Engine).
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Cloud Run and GKE for custom runtimes.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Runtime, registry, gateway and development framework are distinct components.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Catalog and discover agents across teams.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Agents are governed as Unity Catalog models; MCP services and model services are cataloged securables.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Foundry Control Plane asset inventory and registered external/custom agents.
awsSagemakerAi: No single SageMaker-wide agent registry; use tags, Service Catalog and application inventory patterns.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock agent resources plus AWS asset/governance services.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Agent Registry for agents, tools and MCP servers.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Cloud Asset Inventory.
importantDistinctionCaveat: A registry should capture owner, purpose, risk, tools, data, model, version and deployment status.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Maintain conversational or task state across interactions.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Application-managed state, MLflow traces and Databricks data stores.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Foundry Agent Service threads/conversations and application state services.
awsSagemakerAi: DynamoDB, ElastiCache/MemoryDB and application state.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock agent session state and AgentCore Memory capabilities.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Agent Platform Sessions.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Firestore, Memorystore and Spanner.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Session state has retention, privacy and deletion implications.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Store reusable learned/user context under governance.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Unity Catalog tables/vector stores and application-managed memory patterns.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Foundry/application memory using Azure data stores and agent features.
awsSagemakerAi: DynamoDB, OpenSearch, MemoryDB and application-managed memory.
amazonBedrock: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Memory.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Agent Platform Memory Bank with memory revision history.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Firestore, Spanner and vector services.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Memory should have provenance, user controls, expiry, correction and deletion mechanisms.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Publish reusable skills/tools for agents.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Unity Catalog functions, MCP Services and connections.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Foundry tools, functions and connected resources.
awsSagemakerAi: Lambda, Step Functions, API Gateway and service catalog patterns.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock action groups, AgentCore tools/gateway and Lambda.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Skill Registry and Agent Garden.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Cloud Run, Workflows, Integration Connectors and API Gateway.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Reusable skills require interface contracts, authorization, testing and ownership.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Connect governed enterprise data to models for grounded responses.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Vector Search, Genie/SQL tools, Unity Catalog data and agent tool patterns.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Foundry IQ and Azure AI Search knowledge sources.
awsSagemakerAi: SageMaker and OpenSearch/Aurora patterns.
amazonBedrock: Knowledge Bases for Amazon Bedrock.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: RAG Engine.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Vertex AI Search, BigQuery, AlloyDB, Spanner and Vector Search.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Managed RAG does not remove document permissions, freshness and retrieval-evaluation requirements.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Search enterprise content with ACL-aware semantic retrieval.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Databricks Vector Search, Genie and governed data tools.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Azure AI Search and Foundry IQ.
awsSagemakerAi: Amazon Kendra and OpenSearch.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock Knowledge Bases and Kendra/OpenSearch integration patterns.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Agent Search / Gemini Enterprise search and grounding capabilities.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Vertex AI Search and Google Workspace connectors.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Validate ACL propagation, freshness, citations, data residency and connector scope.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Store embeddings and execute similarity search.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Databricks Vector Search with Unity Catalog governance.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Azure AI Search, Cosmos DB vector search, Azure PostgreSQL pgvector and Azure DocumentDB vector search.
awsSagemakerAi: OpenSearch vector engine, Aurora/PostgreSQL pgvector and DocumentDB vector search.
amazonBedrock: Knowledge Bases can use supported vector stores; Bedrock is not itself the general vector database.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Agent Platform Vector Search 2.0 and RAG Engine.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: AlloyDB AI, Spanner, Cloud SQL pgvector and Bigtable patterns.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Choose by scale, filtering, transactions, hybrid search, latency and operational data integration.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Aggregate policy status, risk signals and noncompliance across AI assets.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Unity Catalog audit/system tables plus external GRC reporting.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Foundry Control Plane Compliance pane with Azure Policy, Defender and Purview integrations.
awsSagemakerAi: AWS Audit Manager, Security Hub, Config and SageMaker governance artifacts.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock controls feed AWS governance and audit services.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Govern view, Agent Registry, audit logs, Model Armor and Security Command Center.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Security Command Center, Assured Workloads and Audit Manager patterns.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Cloud product controls provide evidence; they do not automatically establish legal compliance.

controlOrEngineeringPurpose: Identify noncompliant AI resources and apply corrective controls at scale.
databricksUnityCatalogUnityAiGatewayMlfl: Policy/IaC automation, Unity Catalog privileges and service-policy updates.
microsoftFoundryAzureMlPurview: Foundry Control Plane bulk remediation and Azure Policy.
awsSagemakerAi: AWS Config remediation, Systems Manager Automation and Organizations policies.
amazonBedrock: Bedrock resource changes through CloudFormation, Config and IAM automation.
geminiEnterpriseAgentPlatform: Organization Policy, Terraform and policy automation.
complementaryGoogleCloudServices: Organization Policy Service and Security Command Center automation.
importantDistinctionCaveat: Automated remediation needs change control, rollback and exception handling.
